testcase.name: test_manual_scale_down

failure.message: AssertionError: Scale down failed: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auto_scaling_priority_lanes.py:301: in test_manual_scale_down assert response.status_code == 200, f"Scale down failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Scale down failed: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_manual_scale_enforces_limits
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_auto_scaling_priority_lanes.py:28: in setup assert response.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 10 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_manual_scale_requires_admin
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_auto_scaling_priority_lanes.py:28: in setup assert response.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 10 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
